source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the diagram, $F G H I$ is a trapezium with side $G F$ parallel to $H I$. The lengths of $F G$ and $H I$ are 50 and 20 respectively. The point $J$ is on the side $F G$ such that the segment $I J$ divides the trapezium into two parts of equal area. What is the length of $F J$ ? <image1>
